subcodes.first_line: O Safdar! God willing, thou wilt transform the darkness of tyranny and hypocrisy that hath encompassed the horizons into the light of justice and unity this day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا صفدر انشاء الله ظلمت ظلم و نفاق آفاق را بنور عدل و اتفاق مبدل سازی امروز
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @unity; oneness of humanity, @spiritual transformation
